FROM enrollments 
WHERE enrollments.id = $1::UUID

SELECT enrollments.id, enrollments.student_id, enrollments.classroom_id, enrollments.status, enrollments.enrolled_at, enrollments.confirmed_at, enrollments.cancelled_at, enrollments.completed_at, enrollments.semester, enrollments.academic_year, enrollments.grade, enrollments.notes, enrollments.enrolled_by, enrollments.is_deleted, enrollments.created_at, enrollments.updated_at 
FROM enrollments 
WHERE enrollments.student_id = $1::UUID AND enrollments.classroom_id = $2::UUID AND enrollments.is_deleted = false AND enrollments.status != $3::enrollmentstatus

SELECT pg_catalog.pg_type.typname

WHERE pg_catalog.pg_type.typname = $1::VARCHAR AND pg_catalog.pg_type_is_visible(pg_catalog.pg_type.oid) AND pg_catalog.pg_namespace.nspname != $2::VARCHAR

SELECT pg_catalog.pg_class.relname 
FROM pg_catalog.pg_class JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace ON pg_catalog.pg_namespace.oid = pg_catalog.pg_class.relnamespace

CREATE CREATE TABLE enrollments (

tags.value:
CREATE TABLE enrollments (
	id UUID NOT NULL, 
	student_id UUID NOT NULL, 
	classroom_id UUID NOT NULL, 
	status enrollmentstatus, 
	enrolled_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	confirmed_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	cancelled_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	completed_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	semester VARCHAR(20), 
	academic_year VARCHAR(9), 
	grade FLOAT, 
	notes TEXT, 
	enrolled_by UUID, 
	is_deleted BOOLEAN, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

SELECT enrollments.id, enrollments.student_id, enrollments.classroom_id, enrollments.status, enrollments.enrolled_at, enrollments.confirmed_at, enrollments.cancelled_at, enrollments.completed_at, enrollments.semester, enrollments.academic_year, enrollments.grade, enrollments.notes, enrollments.enrolled_by, enrollments.is_deleted, enrollments.created_at, enrollments.updated_at 
FROM enrollments 
WHERE enrollments.id = $1::UUID AND enrollments.is_deleted = false

tags.value:
SELECT count(*) AS count_1 
FROM (SELECT enrollments.id AS id, enrollments.student_id AS student_id, enrollments.classroom_id AS classroom_id, enrollments.status AS status, enrollments.enrolled_at AS enrolled_at, enrollments.confirmed_at AS confirmed_at, enrollments.cancelled_at AS cancelled_at, enrollments.completed_at AS completed_at, enrollments.semester AS semester, enrollments.academic_year AS academic_year, enrollments.grade AS grade, enrollments.notes AS notes, enrollments.enrolled_by AS enrolled_by, enrollments.is_deleted AS is_deleted, enrollments.created_at AS created_at, enrollments.updated_at AS updated_at 
FROM enrollments 
WHERE enrollments.is_deleted = false) AS anon_1

SELECT enrollments.id, enrollments.student_id, enrollments.classroom_id, enrollments.status, enrollments.enrolled_at, enrollments.confirmed_at, enrollments.cancelled_at, enrollments.completed_at, enrollments.semester, enrollments.academic_year, enrollments.grade, enrollments.notes, enrollments.enrolled_by, enrollments.is_deleted, enrollments.created_at, enrollments.updated_at 
FROM enrollments 
WHERE enrollments.is_deleted = false ORDER BY enrollments.created_at DESC 
 LIMIT $1::INTEGER OFFSET $2::INTEGER
